self.description: The URL of the issue type in the REST API.

id.description: The ID of the issue type.

description.description: The description of the issue type.

iconUrl.description: The URL of the issue type icon.

name.description: The name of the issue type (e.g., Bug, Story, Task, Epic).

subtask.description: Whether this issue type is used to create sub-tasks.

avatarId.description: The ID of the avatar for the issue type.

hierarchyLevel.description: The hierarchy level of the issue type.
